scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace web" "npm run dev --workspace api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace api && npm run typecheck --workspace web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace api && npm run lint --workspace web
